title: Non-7 CTR Targets — Phase 14B Day 3

action: The 5 remaining pages could be CTR targets BUT: (1) geo pages have minimal impressions, (2) tool variant is low-priority, (3) guide page identity unknown. Without fresh query data, CTR fixes would be speculative.
recommendation: Qasem should check GSC dashboard for the 5 non-7 pages. If any have significant impressions and zero clicks, Hermes can apply CTR fixes.
